## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? One paragraph max. -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change (API or schema change)
- [ ] Refactor (no behaviour change)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/infra

## Testing

- [ ] `go test -race ./...` passes locally
- [ ] `npm test` passes for changed apps
- [ ] New tests added for new behaviour
- [ ] Benchmark unchanged or improved (`go test -bench=. -benchmem`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the style in `.golangci.yml` (no lint errors)
- [ ] Relevant docs updated (README, mkdocs pages, inline comments)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `Unreleased`
- [ ] No API keys, secrets, or PII in the diff

## Related Issues

Closes #
